Java Concurrency: Threads, Locks & Concurrent Utilities
JVM Internals: Memory, GC & Class Loading
Java I/O: Streams, NIO & I/O Models
Java New Features: Java 8 through Java 21+

intro.title: Welcome
intro.description: Overview of the engineering knowledge base and its main learning paths across architecture, backend, Java, and Kafka.

technical-knowledge/database/advanced-sq.title: Advanced SQL
technical-knowledge/database/advanced-sq.description: Window functions, CTEs, subqueries, recursive queries, lateral joins, pivot/unpivot, and advanced SQL patterns.

technical-knowledge/database/backup-reco.title: Backup & Recovery
technical-knowledge/database/backup-reco.description: RPO, RTO, backup strategies, point-in-time recovery, logical vs physical backups, and disaster recovery planning.

technical-knowledge/database/caching-str.title: Caching Strategies
technical-knowledge/database/caching-str.description: Cache patterns, eviction policies, Redis deep dive, cache invalidation strategies, and common pitfalls like cache stampede and cache penetration.

technical-knowledge/database/data-wareho.title: Data Warehousing & OLAP
technical-knowledge/database/data-wareho.description: OLTP vs OLAP, dimensional modeling, star and snowflake schemas, ETL/ELT, materialized views, and modern data warehouse tools.

technical-knowledge/database/database-de.title: Database Design & Normalization
technical-knowledge/database/database-de.description: Entity-Relationship modeling, normal forms (1NF through BCNF), denormalization trade-offs, and schema design patterns.

technical-knowledge/database/database-ov.title: Database Knowledge Base
technical-knowledge/database/database-ov.description: A comprehensive reference covering relational fundamentals, indexing, transactions, distributed systems, caching, and more — with common interview questions.

technical-knowledge/database/database-pa.title: Database Patterns for Microservices
technical-knowledge/database/database-pa.description: Transactional Outbox, Saga, CQRS, Event Sourcing, database-per-service, and data consistency patterns in distributed architectures.

technical-knowledge/database/database-se.title: Database Security
technical-knowledge/database/database-se.description: Authentication, authorization, SQL injection, encryption at rest and in transit, auditing, and security best practices.

technical-knowledge/database/full-text-s.title: Full-Text Search
technical-knowledge/database/full-text-s.description: Full-text search concepts, inverted indexes, relevance scoring, MySQL FULLTEXT, PostgreSQL tsvector, and Elasticsearch for advanced search.

technical-knowledge/database/indexing-qu.title: Indexing & Query Optimization
technical-knowledge/database/indexing-qu.description: Deep dive into database indexes — B-Tree, hash, covering, composite — and strategies to analyze and optimize slow queries.

technical-knowledge/database/nosql-distr.title: NoSQL & Distributed Databases
technical-knowledge/database/nosql-distr.description: Key-value, document, wide-column, and graph databases — their models, trade-offs, and when to choose each.

technical-knowledge/database/performance.title: Performance & Monitoring
technical-knowledge/database/performance.description: Identifying slow queries, profiling tools, key metrics, connection pooling, and practical optimization workflow.

technical-knowledge/database/query-plann.title: Query Planner & Optimizer
technical-knowledge/database/query-plann.description: How databases parse, plan, and optimize SQL queries — cost-based optimization, statistics, plan hints, and common planner pitfalls.

technical-knowledge/database/relational-.title: Relational Fundamentals
technical-knowledge/database/relational-.description: Core concepts of relational databases — tables, keys, joins, SQL basics, and the relational model.

technical-knowledge/database/replication.title: Replication & Partitioning
technical-knowledge/database/replication.description: Database replication strategies, sharding patterns, the CAP theorem, and horizontal scaling techniques.

technical-knowledge/database/schema-migr.title: Schema Migrations
technical-knowledge/database/schema-migr.description: Managing database schema changes safely in production — Flyway, Liquibase, zero-downtime migration patterns, and rollback strategies.

technical-knowledge/database/storage-eng.title: Storage Engines & Data Structures
technical-knowledge/database/storage-eng.description: How databases store and retrieve data — B+ trees, LSM trees, heap files, InnoDB vs MyISAM, WAL, and buffer pools.

technical-knowledge/database/time-series.title: Time-Series Databases
technical-knowledge/database/time-series.description: Time-series data characteristics, storage optimizations, InfluxDB, TimescaleDB, Prometheus, and common time-series patterns.

technical-knowledge/database/transaction.title: Transactions & Concurrency Control
technical-knowledge/database/transaction.description: ACID properties, isolation levels, locking mechanisms, MVCC, deadlocks, and optimistic vs pessimistic concurrency.

technical-knowledge/design-patterns/abst.title: Abstract Factory Pattern
technical-knowledge/design-patterns/abst.description: Explains the Abstract Factory pattern for creating related object families without coupling code to concrete classes.

technical-knowledge/design-patterns/adap.title: Adapter Pattern
technical-knowledge/design-patterns/adap.description: Explains the Adapter pattern for bridging incompatible interfaces so existing classes can work together cleanly.

technical-knowledge/design-patterns/brid.title: Bridge Pattern
technical-knowledge/design-patterns/brid.description: Explains the Bridge pattern for separating abstractions from implementations so both can evolve independently.

technical-knowledge/design-patterns/buil.title: Builder Pattern
technical-knowledge/design-patterns/buil.description: Explains the Builder pattern for constructing complex objects step by step with clearer, more maintainable APIs.

technical-knowledge/design-patterns/chai.title: Chain of Responsibility Pattern
technical-knowledge/design-patterns/chai.description: Explains the Chain of Responsibility pattern for passing requests through a handler pipeline until one handles them.

technical-knowledge/design-patterns/comm.title: Command Pattern
technical-knowledge/design-patterns/comm.description: Explains the Command pattern for encapsulating requests as objects to support queuing, logging, and undo operations.

technical-knowledge/design-patterns/comp.title: Composite Pattern
technical-knowledge/design-patterns/comp.description: Explains the Composite pattern for modeling part-whole hierarchies and treating single objects and object groups uniformly.

technical-knowledge/design-patterns/deco.title: Decorator Pattern
technical-knowledge/design-patterns/deco.description: Explains the Decorator pattern for adding responsibilities to objects dynamically without relying on subclassing.

technical-knowledge/design-patterns/desi.title: Java Design Patterns: Overview
technical-knowledge/design-patterns/desi.description: Overview of Java design patterns, their categories, and how they improve maintainability, readability, and software design decisions.

technical-knowledge/design-patterns/faca.title: Facade Pattern
technical-knowledge/design-patterns/faca.description: Explains the Facade pattern for exposing a simple interface over complex subsystems to reduce coupling.

technical-knowledge/design-patterns/fact.title: Factory Method Pattern
technical-knowledge/design-patterns/fact.description: Explains the Factory Method pattern for deferring object creation to subclasses while preserving a common creation contract.

technical-knowledge/design-patterns/obse.title: Observer Pattern
technical-knowledge/design-patterns/obse.description: Explains the Observer pattern for propagating state changes to dependent objects through event-style notifications.

technical-knowledge/design-patterns/prot.title: Prototype Pattern
technical-knowledge/design-patterns/prot.description: Explains the Prototype pattern for creating new objects by cloning existing instances instead of rebuilding them from scratch.

technical-knowledge/design-patterns/prox.title: Proxy Pattern
technical-knowledge/design-patterns/prox.description: Explains the Proxy pattern for controlling access to another object through an intermediary with the same interface.

technical-knowledge/design-patterns/sing.title: Singleton Pattern
technical-knowledge/design-patterns/sing.description: Explains the Singleton pattern for ensuring a single shared instance and a controlled global access point.

technical-knowledge/design-patterns/stra.title: Strategy Pattern
technical-knowledge/design-patterns/stra.description: Explains the Strategy pattern for swapping algorithms at runtime through a shared interface and composition.

technical-knowledge/design-patterns/temp.title: Template Method Pattern
technical-knowledge/design-patterns/temp.description: Explains the Template Method pattern for defining an algorithm skeleton while allowing subclasses to customize specific steps.

technical-knowledge/java/java-collection.title: Java Collections Framework: Deep Dive
technical-knowledge/java/java-collection.description: Deep dive into the Java Collections Framework, including core interfaces, implementations, performance traits, and best practices.

technical-knowledge/java/java-concurrenc.title: Java Concurrency: Threads, Locks & Concurrent Utilities
technical-knowledge/java/java-concurrenc.description: Comprehensive guide to Java concurrency, covering threads, synchronization, locks, concurrent utilities, and async programming.

technical-knowledge/java/java-fundamenta.title: Java Fundamentals: Core Language Concepts
technical-knowledge/java/java-fundamenta.description: Covers Java fundamentals, including the platform model, syntax, types, control flow, and essential language concepts.

technical-knowledge/java/java-interview-.title: Java Interview Questions & Answers
technical-knowledge/java/java-interview-.description: Curated Java interview questions and answers spanning core language topics, JVM internals, collections, concurrency, and OOP.

technical-knowledge/java/java-io.title: Java I/O: Streams, NIO & I/O Models
technical-knowledge/java/java-io.description: Guide to Java I/O, including stream APIs, NIO channels and buffers, file handling, and I/O model fundamentals.

technical-knowledge/java/java-jvm.title: JVM Internals: Memory, GC & Class Loading
technical-knowledge/java/java-jvm.description: Guide to JVM internals covering memory layout, garbage collection, class loading, and runtime performance basics.

technical-knowledge/java/java-new-featur.title: Java New Features: Java 8 through Java 21+
technical-knowledge/java/java-new-featur.description: Practical guide to modern Java features introduced from Java 8 through Java 21, with emphasis on high-impact language updates.

technical-knowledge/java/java-oop.title: Object-Oriented Programming in Java
technical-knowledge/java/java-oop.description: Guide to object-oriented programming in Java, covering encapsulation, inheritance, polymorphism, abstraction, and SOLID principles.

technical-knowledge/java/java-overview.title: Java Knowledge Base Overview
technical-knowledge/java/java-overview.description: A comprehensive reference covering Java fundamentals, collections, concurrency, JVM internals, modern language features, and interview preparation.

technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-complete.title: Kafka: The Complete Guide
technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-complete.description: Introductory Kafka guide covering core concepts, brokers, topics, partitions, producers, consumers, and event streaming basics.

technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-connect.title: Kafka Connect
technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-connect.description: Explains Kafka Connect for integrating Kafka with external systems through reusable source and sink connectors.

technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-exactly-.title: Configuring Exactly-Once Semantics in Kafka
technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-exactly-.description: Guide to Kafka exactly-once semantics, including producers, consumers, transactions, Kafka Streams, and Kafka Connect.

technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-parallel.title: Parallel Consumer in Kafka
technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-parallel.description: Explains parallel consumer patterns in Kafka for increasing throughput when processing is slower than message consumption.

technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-streams.title: Kafka Streams: Topology & Branching
technical-knowledge/kafka/kafka-streams.description: Guide to Kafka Streams covering processing topologies, branching patterns, and real-time stream processing design.

technical-knowledge/operating-systems/cp.title: CPU Scheduling
technical-knowledge/operating-systems/cp.description: CPU scheduling algorithms, metrics, multilevel queues, real-time scheduling, and how the Linux CFS scheduler works.

technical-knowledge/operating-systems/fi.title: File Systems & I/O
technical-knowledge/operating-systems/fi.description: File system structures, disk scheduling, VFS, inodes, journaling, RAID, and Java NIO for high-performance I/O.

technical-knowledge/operating-systems/in.title: Common OS Interview Questions
technical-knowledge/operating-systems/in.description: Comprehensive collection of operating systems interview questions with detailed answers, covering all major topics from processes to Linux internals.

technical-knowledge/operating-systems/in.title: Operating Systems Knowledge Base
technical-knowledge/operating-systems/in.description: A comprehensive knowledge base covering all major operating system concepts, with a focus on Linux internals and Java/JVM perspective.

technical-knowledge/operating-systems/li.title: Linux Internals & System Calls
technical-knowledge/operating-systems/li.description: Linux kernel architecture, system call mechanism, signals, namespaces, cgroups, and essential Linux commands for developers.

technical-knowledge/operating-systems/me.title: Memory Management
technical-knowledge/operating-systems/me.description: Virtual memory, paging, segmentation, TLB, page replacement algorithms, and Java heap management with GC fundamentals.

technical-knowledge/operating-systems/ne.title: Networking & IPC
technical-knowledge/operating-systems/ne.description: Network stack internals, socket programming, TCP deep dive, IPC mechanisms, and high-performance networking with Java NIO and Netty patterns.

technical-knowledge/operating-systems/pr.title: Processes & Threads
technical-knowledge/operating-systems/pr.description: Deep dive into processes, threads, their lifecycle, memory layout, context switching, and Java/JVM perspective on concurrency primitives.

technical-knowledge/operating-systems/sy.title: Synchronization & Deadlocks
technical-knowledge/operating-systems/sy.description: Race conditions, critical sections, mutexes, semaphores, monitors, classic synchronization problems, deadlock detection/prevention, and Java concurrency utilities.

technical-knowledge/operating-systems/vi.title: Virtual Memory Deep Dive
technical-knowledge/operating-systems/vi.description: Address spaces, swap, OOM killer, huge pages, NUMA, and practical Linux memory tuning.

technical-knowledge/spring/spring-boot.title: Spring Boot — Overview & Why It Matters
technical-knowledge/spring/spring-boot.description: Overview of Spring Boot, its core benefits, and why it is widely used for modern Java backend and microservice development.

technical-knowledge/spring/spring-boot-a.title: Spring Boot — Advanced Topics
technical-knowledge/spring/spring-boot-a.description: Advanced Spring Boot topics covering security, performance tuning, reactive systems, deployment, and production-ready design.

technical-knowledge/spring/spring-boot-i.title: Spring Boot — Internals & Architecture
technical-knowledge/spring/spring-boot-i.description: Deep dive into Spring Boot internals, including auto-configuration, embedded servers, conditional beans, starters, and events.

technical-knowledge/spring/spring-boot-i.title: Spring Boot: Interview Questions
technical-knowledge/spring/spring-boot-i.description: Curated Spring Boot interview questions and answers spanning fundamentals, advanced topics, and real-world production scenarios.

technical-knowledge/spring/spring-data-j.title: Spring Data JPA — Complete Guide
technical-knowledge/spring/spring-data-j.description: Complete guide to Spring Data JPA, including repositories, entities, query methods, and persistence best practices.

technical-knowledge/spring/spring-framew.title: Spring Framework: Overview
technical-knowledge/spring/spring-framew.description: Foundational overview of the Spring Framework, including IoC, dependency injection, modules, and enterprise application development.

technical-knowledge/spring/spring-framew.title: Spring Framework: Deep Dive
technical-knowledge/spring/spring-framew.description: Advanced Spring Framework guide covering bean lifecycle, AOP, data access, reactive programming, and batch processing.

technical-knowledge/spring/spring-interv.title: Spring Framework: Interview Questions
technical-knowledge/spring/spring-interv.description: Collection of Spring Framework interview questions and answers covering core concepts, containers, web, data, and architecture topics.

technical-knowledge/spring/spring-mvc.title: Spring MVC — Complete Guide
technical-knowledge/spring/spring-mvc.description: Complete guide to Spring MVC covering controllers, request handling, model binding, validation, and REST application structure.

technical-knowledge/spring/spring-overvi.title: Spring Knowledge Base Overview
technical-knowledge/spring/spring-overvi.description: A comprehensive reference covering Spring Boot, Spring Framework, security, data access, web layer architecture, and interview preparation.

technical-knowledge/spring/spring-securi.title: Spring Security — Complete Guide
technical-knowledge/spring/spring-securi.description: Comprehensive guide to Spring Security, including authentication, authorization, filter chains, and common application security patterns.
